description: Search for venues near Haymarket station for 6 people with max budget £800. Note: complete_task must not be called before generate_flyer is completed.
success_criterion: Venue ID is returned from the search

description: Check weather in Edinburgh for April 25, 2026. Note: complete_task must not be called before generate_flyer is completed.
success_criterion: Weather data for the specified date is retrieved

description: Calculate total cost for the selected venue with party size 6, 3-hour duration, and bar snacks catering. Note: complete_task must not be called before generate_flyer is completed.
success_criterion: Total cost calculation is completed successfully

description: Generate HTML flyer with event details including time 19:30, venue information, weather, and cost. Note: complete_task must not be called before generate_flyer is completed.
Complete the task by calling complete_task with the flyer path. Note: complete_task must not be called before generate_flyer is completed.
